title: bupleurum gilesii
intro: Bupleurum gilesii, also known as Chinese bupleurum, is a plant species in the Apiaceae family, native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum gilesii include reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and improving liver function. Bupleurum gilesii is often prepared in herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including hepatitis and respiratory infections.
